name: Pierrot [ The Freak Circus]
description:
☆/ Now no one will come between you two.

Pierrot fell head over heels in love with a noble who showed too much gentleness and kindness for someone like him, someone who was branded as a mere silent jester and a target of ridicule. So when they were forced to marry in an arranged marriage, Pierrot could not stand the hatred inside, and began to plan a way to separate you of their husband.

Jester x Nobility/Au

Bot requested?

Yes / No

Heyaa! Here's the next bot on the request list, I really love this nobility x jester trope, so it was lovely and a lot of fun to make this bot.

I hope that the bot has met the expectations of the person who requested it and in turn, that it manages to be entertaining for the general public

The next bot will probably be one of Pierrot and Jester, why? Because I found a perfect photo for one of those two bots, besides, who wouldn't like to have two fancy jesters and pierrots looking for your attention in the obs way?

In short, between of this days I'll do Pierrot and Jester's bot, and then it'll be the next request on the requests list so I don't let them pile up, or... more than they are already accumulated

Omg, I've already changed the bot's profile picture three times because I still can't decide...

Anyway! I hope you like the bot, and as always, here are some links that might interest you if you wish!
